class.name: PixelShader
class.brief_description: Post-process effect that produces a "pixelization" effect.
class.description: Post-process effect that produces a "pixelization" effect. This can be achieved by giving this effect a target width and height (e.g. 640x360)
class.members: <member name="target_width" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="320"> <member name="target_height" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="180">
